posts.author: tarsulowicz (Tammarie Arsulowicz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m currently trying to use the following formula to subtract purchased inventory from a mirrored column on my board:

Formula: (Column 1) - (Column 2)

General Caster Recipe:

image821×265 14.3 KB

This formula works correctly when applied to a standard (non-mirrored) column. However, when I attempt to cast the result into the mirrored number column, I receive the error message: “Resource not found.”

I have verified that the mirror column ID is correct, and the formula itself is functioning as expected. Could you provide any insights into what might be causing this issue?

Thank you!

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @tarsulowicz
Is the mirrored column set to allow multiple board connections?
If so, there’s a limitation which prevents General Caster from casting to the destination column. The mirrored column must be connected to one board only, even if the cell is actually linked to a single item.

posts.author: tarsulowicz (Tammarie Arsulowicz)
posts.cookedHtml: No, the board is only connected to one board.

posts.author: boazThaller (boaz thaller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
This can be achieved with Autoboost

You can apply the value to multiple items connected from multiple boards.
Check out this video
